title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Nexus Malls - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Nexus Malls - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Nexus Malls, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Sales Manager for our Pune operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Nexus Malls:
Nexus Malls is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nexus Malls!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
